artPrompt: The cataclysmic instant a vast clock tower's blank face blazes cold gold as a shockwave of ash erupts outward, ashen-robed figures crumbling and scattering across a darkened main street beneath a blood-dark sky. Guttering candles snuff in the blast. The wide frame towers the tolling spire over the dissolving crowd, one searing light source at its heart, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Strike of Midnight
text: Destroy all creatures. For each creature destroyed this way, you put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock, then if the Doomsday Clock has twelve or more doom counters, this becomes midnight: remove all doom counters, you gain 13 life, and you say "I warned you all" out loud. (You may not say it quietly.)
flavorText: The clock struck twelve. Then it kept going, which clocks are not supposed to do.
